fun solve(nums: Array<Long>, k: Long): Long {

    val n = nums.size

    if (n == 0) return 0L // but according to constraints, n >=1

    nums.sort()

    var maxLength = 1L

    for (i in 0 until n) {

        val target = nums[i] * k

        var low = i

        var high = n - 1

        var best = i - 1

        while (low <= high) {

            val mid = (low + high) / 2

            if (nums[mid] <= target) {

                best = mid

                low = mid + 1

            } else {

                high = mid - 1

            }

        }

        val currentLength = best - i + 1

        if (currentLength > maxLength) {

            maxLength = currentLength

        }

    }

    return n - maxLength

}
